title: Solution Architect
description:
The Data and AI Solution Pre-Sales Lead/Pre-Sales Architect is a subject matter expert in ETL, Data & AI and broader data platform.

This role is required to complete the overall technical design of the large, complex elements of the solution to meet a client’s business requirements.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Pre-sales support: Work closely with sales and delivery team to define, demonstrate, build solution and estimate for a potential opportunity.
  • Providing vision on industry trends and client challenges to develop compelling value propositions for prioritized industries
  • Developing Go-To-Market approaches for the Singapore/APAC Cluster across geographies and industries, aligned with NTT DATA Group’s Data & AI portfolio and offerings
  • Supporting the Sales League in identifying both target customers and relevant Data & AI solutions to enhance sales performance
  • Engaging in client discussions, identifying new opportunities, and driving them with Sales Teams
  • Augmenting Sales Teams for effective pre-sales activities (e.g., customer engagement pitches, solutioning, proposals)
  • Leveraging the most appropriate global capabilities (e.g., Centers of Excellence, Global Delivery Centers, and local practices), assets, delivery models, and methodologies to deliver optimal sales and delivery solutions
  • Differentiating NTT DATA’s Data & AI customer proposals through innovation, leveraging Group capabilities (e.g., AI Labs, Innovation Centres, Robotics Lab, Research Centres)
  • Bridging market demand with skill supply plans, contributing to the development of short- and long-term recruitment and reskilling strategies to support growth
  • Compiling and implementing development plans for Migration/upgrade of Data and AI platform.
  • Ability to guide the development team on the design, testing, and modification stages.


Knowledge and Attributes:

  • At least 10 years of experience in consulting and/or IT services;
  • Having led data-driven projects with direct connection to business outcomes: data platform with modern technologies (Azure, AWS, Google, Snowflake, Databricks); data government projects (Informatica, Collibra, Azure Pureview); AI projects (Custom ML/AI models, Gen AI, Agentic AI);
  • Experienced in strategic selling of Data and AI solutions in Singapore.
  • Being talented to blend Business perspective and Technological solutions;
  • Relevant CxO relationships, preferably in Singapore, both towards business and IT stakeholders;
  • Knowledgeable of Data & AI market dynamics;
  • Fluent in English with excellent communication/oration skills.


Academic Qualifications and Certifications:

  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent in information technology/systems or Equivalent.
  • Hands on experience in any of Data and AI platforms.
  • Prior Pre-sales experience with systems integration (SI) organization is preferred.


Required experience:

  • Advanced track record as a developer and architect of new systems/solutions.
  • Advanced client engagement and development consulting experience.
  • Advanced experience managing expectations when balancing alternatives against business and financial constraints.
  • Advanced experience in a variety of architectures for specific domain or specialization.
  • Advanced designer and development know-how.
  • Advanced experience presenting technical solutions to non-technical audiences.
  • Advanced experience working in an agile development environment.

postedCompany.description:
NTT Singapore Pte Ltd (NTTS) is the regional headquarters of NTT Communications Corporation (NTT Com) for Asia Pacific Region.

Established in 1997, NTT Singapore has more than 10 years of expertise in providing information and communications technology (ICT) solutions worldwide.

NTT Singapore offers diverse high-quality connectivity, data centre solutions, security services, IT management services, voice and conferencing solutions and solution integration services to its enterprise customers.

NTT Communications is a wholly owned subsidiary of Nippon Telegraph and Telephone Corporation (NTT Corp.), one of the world’s largest providers of telecommunications services.

 In 2013, NTT Corp. is ranked no.1 in telecom industry in the Fortune Global 500* list with operating revenues of more than $133,077 million. It is positioned 32nd among the top 500 corporations worldwide.

 NTT Com's extensive global infrastructure includes Arcstar secure private networks, which cover 196 countries/regions and a tier-1 IP backbone network connected with major ISPs worldwide, as well as secure data centers at over 150 locations worldwide.
postedCompany.name: NTT SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
